case_title: WAYNE WOO ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WARREN WOO (SON) AND JEANNETTE WOO (WIFE OF WAYNE WOO). FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, WAYNE
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WOO, WAYNE WOO, JEANNETTE WOO, WARREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $89.50) SERVED AUG-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO, WAYNE WOO, JEANNETTE WOO, WARREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $3,020.00 PRINCIPAL, $139.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,159.50, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFFS SUFFICIENTLY ESTABLISHED THEIR CLAIM FOR DAMAGE DUE TO POWER SURGE, IN THE AMOUNT REQUESTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,020.00 FILED BY WOO, WAYNE WOO, JEANNETTE WOO, WARREN AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAYNE WOO IS NOT PRESENT, IS REPRESENTED BY CO-PLAINTIFF WARREN WOO (SON) AND CO-PLAINTIFF JEANNETTE WOO (WIFE OF WAYNE WOO) (SEE SCANNED SC-109 FORM). PLAINTIFF WARREN WOO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JEANNETT WOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
